Name: Mattel163
Note: Mobile card-game specialists. UNO!, UNO Wonder, Phase 10, Skip-Bo. Founded 2017 as a Mattel × NetEase joint venture; Mattel agreed to acquire full ownership February 2026.

Name: Mattel Games Studio
Note: Self-publishing original mobile games. First two original titles scheduled for 2026.

Name: MDS Digital Experiences
Note: Companion apps, AR and cross-product digital moments connecting play and physical product.

Name: Bandit Island
Note: Developing MOTU: Legends Unite, the GameNight cloud co-op launching on Amazon Luna June 5, 2026.

Name: Bamtang Games
Note: Developer of Hot Wheels Let's Race: Ultimate Speed on Switch, PS5, Xbox Series X|S and PC.

Name: GameMill Entertainment
Note: Publisher of Hot Wheels Let's Race: Ultimate Speed on consoles and PC.

Name: Hutch
Note: Developer of Hot Wheels Race Off+ on Apple Arcade.

Name: Look North World
Note: Built UNO Royale on Fortnite via Unreal Editor for Fortnite.

Name: Preloaded
Note: Built UNO: Bridge Clash on Roblox, and works across Mattel's broader creator-platform portfolio.
